entries.name: collected_progs
entries.notes: Static evidence indicates std::vector-like container starts at +0x1BB0 (begin), +0x1BB8 (end), +0x1BC0 (capacity). IDs map to prog names via module string table at [868-HACK.exe+0x6A5B8] (6-pointer stride).
